name: cold
title: best herbal teas for cold
description: Pelargonium sidoides tea contains bioactive constituents such as phenolic acids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to alleviate cold symptoms. The herbal tea exhibits expectorant, mucolytic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in relieving congestion, cough, and sore throat associated with the common cold.
